prerequisite_concepts.name: O
prerequisite_concepts.definition: O is a local mathematical quantity introduced by the supporting formula.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: O 是由当前支撑公式引入的局部数学量。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Selection Differential
prerequisite_concepts.definition: The change in mean trait value caused by selection before transmission.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 选择作用在遗传传递之前造成的平均性状值变化。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Mathrml
prerequisite_concepts.definition: Mathrml is a local mathematical quantity introduced by the supporting formula.

prerequisite_concepts.name: Coefficient
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A scalar multiplier that controls the size of a term in the formula.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 控制公式中某一项大小的乘数。

introduced_concepts.name: Class Selection Coefficient
introduced_concepts.definition: A selection coefficient assigned to one class or genotype.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 分配给某一类别或基因型的选择系数。

introduced_concepts.name: Vector or Matrix Quantity
introduced_concepts.definition: A structured mathematical quantity represented as a vector or matrix.

introduced_concepts.name: Vector or Matrix Quantity
introduced_concepts.definition: A structured mathematical quantity represented as a vector or matrix.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 以向量或矩阵形式表示的结构化数学量。

introduced_concepts.name: Sigma Sub E Power 2(s Matrix Power Ts Matrix)
introduced_concepts.definition: Consider first the realized heritability estimated from the unweighted (OLS) regression (Equation 18.14).
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: Sigma Sub E Power 2(s Matrix Power Ts Matrix) 是当前公式涉及的背景概念，用来帮助解释模型中的生物学含义。

introduced_concepts.name: Sigma Sub E Power 2(x Matrix Power Tx Matrix)

introduced_concepts.name: Index
introduced_concepts.definition: A position marker used to identify a class, state, or summation term.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 用于标记类别、状态或求和项位置的下标。

views.name: Standard Deviation

prerequisite_concepts.name: Function
prerequisite_concepts.definition: A rule that maps inputs to outputs in the model.
